message:
test(io): add !Unpin coverage for Pin

AsyncRead/AsyncWrite impls Add regression tests that verify the Pin

blanket implementations of AsyncRead and AsyncWrite work correctly with !Unpin inner types, exercising the Unpin bound removal from the previous commit. - read.rs: add PinnedReader wrapper with PhantomPinned + test pin_wrapper_read_supports_non_unpin_inner that reads through Box::pin(PinnedReader { inner: &[u8], _pin: PhantomPinned }) - write.rs: add PinnedWriter wrapper with PhantomPinned + test pin_wrapper_write_supports_non_unpin_inner that writes through Box::pin(PinnedWriter { inner: Vec, _pin: PhantomPinned }) Both tests use pin_project for safe pin projection and verify the full poll_read/poll_write path works end-to-end with !Unpin types. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
